response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software developer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep hardware/SoC modeling, AI accelerator architecture, and deep-learning workload optimization expertise — none of which appear on the resume. Background is almost entirely application-layer (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, web/GIS), with no evidence of GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, hardware-software co-design, or DNN training/inference optimization. Educational path (BS + ~13 years) meets the bachelor's threshold numerically, but the technical experience is not in the relevant domain.
strengths: Long track record (13+ years) as a senior/staff engineer across diverse stacks
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and embedded work
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing, performance-oriented services at Sociomantic
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or chip architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or DNN training/inference optimization background
Educational background (BS CS) lacks the specialized hardware/architecture focus typical for this role

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU / SIMD / MIMD / DNN optimization background
Senior IC experience and systems-level work in C/C++/DLang
